hero.headline: V V AI Connects Enterprises and Individuals to Enable True Human–AI Collaboration and Co-creation

pillars.title: Powering Every Dimension of Your World

work.label: Work
work.headline: One-Stop Smart Work Collaboration Platform
work.subline: V V AI frees managers from routine tasks by automating planning, execution, and tracking, delivering precise insights for strategic focus and team inspiration. For employees, it acts as an intelligent assistant—handling research, analysis, and drafting—so they can focus on creativity, critical thinking, and human connection, shifting from routine work to high-value innovation.

education.label: Education
education.headline: New AI-powered Collaborative Education Services
education.subline: V V AI bridges home and school, creating a student-centered education ecosystem. It provides teachers with accurate learning analytic for personalized instruction, while giving parents timely, transparent updates on progress and evidence-based parenting advice—uniting both sides to support each child’s unique growth.

life.label: Life
life.headline: Your Personal and Reliable Smart Lifestyle Planner
life.subline: V V AI learns user habits and preferences, then seamlessly coordinates dining, transport, housekeeping, and other services. With one command (or even none), it understands intent and delivers exactly what’s needed—turning “what you want” into instant reality.

health.label: Health
health.headline: Your Reliable, Quick-Response Health Manager
health.subline: V V AI serves as an intelligent health coordinator, connecting personal data, medical knowledge, hospital experts, and rehab services. When needed, it matches the best resources—recommending departments, linking online doctors, or creating tailored plans—making high-quality care more accessible and efficient for everyone.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.headline: AI Intelligent Enterprise Management Platform
enterprise.sub: Innovating how Enterprises are Managed — Improving Operational Efficiency and Business Outcome
enterprise.body: Use V V to improve work efficiency between teams with an innovative and comprehensive collaboration and enterprise management platform.

individual.label: Individual
individual.headline: AI-Powered Personal Assistant
individual.sub: From task executor to decision enabler — From human-serving tools to people-centric services
individual.body: V V career assistant accumulates and assesses your skills and achievements, offering a holistic perspective of your professional journey.

items.title: Next-Generation AI Capabilities
items.body: A next-generation AI intelligence foundation, equipped with globally innovative multi-modal conversational interaction technologies and proprietary AI capabilities. Empowers enterprises with super-intelligent AI work agents, and individuals with AI super assistants.

items.title: Industry-Leading Internal-External Collaboration
items.body: A powerful platform architecture that seamlessly connects internal work collaboration with external business collaboration. Through unified workflows and efficient coordination, it enhances organizational execution.

items.title: Intelligent IM Communication Capabilities
items.body: End-to-end encrypted to ensure privacy and data security. Covers core business communication scenarios, enabling IM-based task execution, approvals, and information sharing with multi-language real-time translation.

items.title: Global Data Security & Compliance
items.body: A globally compliant data platform aligned with international standards, including GDPR. Certified under ISO 27001 and supported by a proprietary security protection framework.

platform.label: Platform
platform.title: V V AI Reimagines Enterprises and Individuals
platform.subtitle: Transforming Collaboration from Execution to Creation
bullets: A Fully Integrated AI-Powered Platform, connecting people, business, finance, and operations through intelligent collaboration
A Unified Workspace, enabling internal coordination and external operational execution with seamless integration

security.title: Built on Trust, Designed for Scale

testimonials.label: Customers
testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Every customer's story and experience fuel our journey forward

t1.quote: V V AI integrates over 30 core enterprise management functions into a single platform with real-time data synchronization, making people, finance, and resource management unprecedentedly simple. It has saved me at least 30% of my time.

t2.quote: V V AI's educational space designed for institutions and families not only helped me increase course sales, but more importantly, it significantly improved the service experience for parents and students, leading to more referral enrollments. Teachers also find it very convenient—they can check class schedules, timetables, and students' attendance status anytime on the APP.

t3.quote: V V AI's office assistant is incredibly useful. It helps me organize daily to-do lists, meeting schedules, approval workflows, and more. I can chat with it anytime to discuss work ideas, and it often gives me very practical suggestions. It also quickly summarizes documents and writes reports for me—my work efficiency has improved a lot!

t4.quote: Because of work, I often have client entertainment needs. Through V V AI's life assistant, I can get creative ideas for hosting clients, it recommends nearby restaurants, and it even suggests the best travel times and transportation arrangements.

t5.quote: I downloaded V V AI on the recommendation of the training center. At first, I only used it to check my child's class schedule, but after using it, I found it can centrally manage the learning plans, bills, notifications, learning evaluations, classroom highlights, after-class homework, and periodic learning reports for all 3 of my children across different institutions. It's truly a treasure app for parents!

meta.title: About V V AI — Our Story
meta.description: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. — Providing Intelligent AI-Driven Services Across Work, Education, Life, and Health from Singapore.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.body: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based AI company building intelligent services across Work, Education, Life, and Health — creating an AI era where services seamlessly transition from being sought to being enjoyed.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.body1: We believe AI should be proactive, not reactive. Our mission is to leverage AI concepts and technologies to deliver precise, intelligent services — creating a world where getting help is effortless.
mission.body2: Headquartered in Singapore, we build for the global enterprise market with a focus on APAC — bringing together Work, Education, Life, and Health into one seamlessly connected platform.
mission.quote: Providing Intelligent AI-Driven Services Across Work, Education, Life, and Health — Leveraging AI concepts and technologies to deliver precise, intelligent services, creating an AI era where services seamlessly transition from being sought to being enjoyed.

items.label: Founded
items.detail: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. established in Singapore

items.label: First Release
items.detail: V V Work Suite launched with 10 core modules

items.label: Life & Health
items.detail: Expanded to personal AI: Life Suite and Health Suite

items.label: AI Engine 2.0
items.detail: Next-generation multi-modal AI assistant rolled out

items.label: Global Expansion
items.detail: Scaling across APAC — more regions coming soon

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We push the boundaries of what AI can do — building tools that think ahead, adapt to context, and deliver value before you ask.

items.title: Trust
items.description: ISO 27001 certified, GDPR compliant, end-to-end encrypted. We treat your data with the same care you would.

items.title: People
items.description: Technology should serve people, not the other way around. Every feature we build starts with a real human need.

items.title: Impact
items.description: From Singapore to the world — we measure success by the time we save and the connections we enable for millions of users.

cta.body: Whether you're an enterprise looking to transform operations or a curious individual — V V AI has a place for you.

meta.title: Pricing — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI uses a flexible enterprise pricing model. Contact our team for a custom quote tailored to your organisation's size and needs.

hero.label: Pricing
hero.body: V V AI is built for organisations of all sizes. Our pricing is customised to your needs — contact us for a tailored quote and we'll get back to you within one business day.

tiers.label: What's Included
tiers.title: Core features by suite
tiers.subtitle: Every suite is fully featured — no artificial feature gating.

contact.label: Enterprise Sales
contact.title: Let's build the right plan for you
contact.body: Our enterprise sales team will understand your use case, recommend the right suites and configurations, and provide transparent pricing — no surprises.
checks: Go live in as little as 7 days

items.q: Does V V AI publish fixed pricing?
items.a: No. V V AI is an enterprise platform and pricing is tailored to your organisation's size, selected suites, and integration requirements. Contact us for a custom quote.

items.q: Can I use multiple suites together?
items.a: Yes — V V AI suites are designed to work together seamlessly. Many organisations use Work + Education or Work + Life as part of an integrated platform deployment.
We offer guided product demos and proof-of-concept pilots for qualified organisations. Book a demo and our team will arrange the right evaluation experience for you.

items.q: How quickly can we get started?
items.a: With our dedicated implementation team, most organisations go live within 7 days of signing. We handle technical setup, data migration, and staff training.
All plans include 7×24 customer support, a dedicated success manager, and full lifecycle operational system support.

meta.title: Security & Compliance — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI is ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant. End-to-end encryption, 24/7 uptime, and enterprise-grade data protection.

hero.label: Security
hero.body: V V AI is built on a foundation of enterprise-grade security. From ISO 27001 certification to end-to-end encryption, your data is safe with us.

dataSecurity.label: Data Security & Technology Assurance
dataSecurity.title: Protection at every layer
dataSecurity.body: Multiple overlapping security measures ensure your organisation's data is always protected — from transmission to storage.

items.title: End-to-End Encryption
items.description: End-to-end data encryption enabling secure bidirectional data transmission. All messages, documents, and records are encrypted at rest and in transit.

items.title: Disaster Recovery & Backups
items.description: Protection against accidental deletion or loss with multiple backup methods and geographically distributed redundancy.

items.title: ISO 27001 Certified & GDPR Compliant
items.description: V V AI holds ISO 27001 certification and is fully compliant with GDPR requirements — meeting the highest international standards for information security management.

items.title: Threat & Anomaly Protection
items.description: Protection against malicious attacks, anomalous requests, and high-risk operation alerts. Real-time monitoring flags suspicious activity before it becomes a threat.

items.title: Granular Access Controls
items.description: Unauthorized access prevented with role-based permission controls. Administrators define exactly who can see, edit, or share every piece of data.

customerSuccess.label: Customer Success Service Assurance

customerSuccess.body: Security doesn't end at technology. Our customer success team ensures your deployment runs smoothly — and grows with you.

items.description: Full lifecycle operational system support, enabling intelligent operational decision-making from deployment through ongoing optimization.

items.description: Ongoing growth-enablement services to support personalized long-term decision strategies as your organisation scales.

compliance.title: ISO 27001 Certified · GDPR Compliant
compliance.body: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. holds ISO/IEC 27001 certification and maintains full compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation. Our information security management system is independently audited and continuously improved.

meta.title: Terms of Service — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI Terms of Service. Read our terms governing your use of V V AI products and services.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body:
By accessing or using any V V AI product or service (collectively, the "Service") operated by V V Technology Pte. Ltd. ("V V AI", "we", "us", or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Service.

You must be at least 18 years of age, or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction, to use the Service. By using the Service, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body:
V V AI provides an AI-powered platform comprising multiple product suites — including V V Work, V V Education, V V Life, and V V Health — designed to assist individuals and organisations with productivity, collaboration, education, lifestyle management, and health management.

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time with reasonable notice.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration
sections.body:
To access certain features, you must create an account. You agree to: (a) provide accurate, current, and complete information; (b) maintain the security of your credentials; (c) promptly notify us of any unauthorised access; and (d) accept responsibility for all activities under your account.

VV AI reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.body:
You agree not to use the Service to: (a) violate any applicable laws or regulations; (b) transmit malicious code, spam, or unauthorised advertising; (c) attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems; (d) infringe upon third-party intellectual property rights; (e) harass, threaten, or harm other users; or (f) interfere with the integrity or performance of the Service.

Violation of this section may result in immediate termination of your account.

sections.heading: 5. Data & Privacy
sections.body:
Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. We are committed to protecting your data in accordance with GDPR and applicable Singapore data protection laws (PDPA). V V AI is ISO 27001 certified.

You retain ownership of all data you input into the Service. By using the Service, you grant V V AI a limited licence to process your data solely to provide and improve the Service.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.body:
All intellectual property in the Service — including software, designs, trademarks, and content — is owned by V V Technology Pte. Ltd. or its licensors. You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to use the Service for its intended purpose.

You may not copy, modify, distribute, reverse-engineer, or create derivative works from any part of the Service without prior written consent.

sections.heading: 7. Fees & Payment
sections.body:
Certain features of the Service require a paid subscription. All fees are stated in Singapore Dollars (SGD) or US Dollars (USD) as indicated. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date.

We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice. Continued use after a price change constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body:
THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.body:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, V V TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD. SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

Our total liability to you for any claim arising from these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid to V V AI in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

sections.heading: 10. Termination
sections.body: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately. We may retain your data for up to 90 days post-termination to allow export, after which it will be permanently deleted in accordance with our data retention policy.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Singapore, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore.

sections.heading: 12. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.heading: 13. Contact
sections.body:
For questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

VV Technology Pte. Ltd.
Singapore
Email: legal@vvai.com

meta.title: Privacy Policy — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI Privacy Policy. Understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

sections.heading: 1. Overview
sections.body:
V V Technology Pte. Ltd. ("V V AI", "we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our products and services.

We comply with the Singapore Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA), the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) for users in the European Economic Area, and other applicable data protection laws. V V AI is ISO 27001 certified.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.body:
We collect the following categories of personal data:

• Account data: name, email address, company name, job title, phone number.
• Usage data: features used, pages visited, actions taken, session duration, device and browser information, IP address.
• Content data: files, messages, documents, and other content you create or upload within the Service.
• Communication data: information from support tickets, demo requests, and correspondence with our team.
• Payment data: billing name, address, and payment method details (processed by our payment provider — we do not store raw card numbers).

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Data
sections.body:
We use your personal data to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve the Service.
• Process transactions and send related information.
• Send product updates, security alerts, and support communications.
• Personalise your experience and deliver relevant features.
• Conduct analytics to understand usage patterns and improve performance.
• Comply with legal obligations.
• Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security incidents.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
sections.body:
For users in the EEA, we process your personal data under the following legal bases:

• Contract: processing necessary to perform our contract with you (providing the Service).
• Legitimate interests: analytics, security monitoring, and service improvement.
• Legal obligation: compliance with applicable laws.
• Consent: for marketing communications — you may withdraw consent at any time.

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing & Disclosure
sections.body:
We may share your data with:

• Service providers: cloud infrastructure, payment processors, analytics providers, and customer support tools — under strict data processing agreements.
• Legal authorities: when required by law, court order, or to protect our rights and safety.
• Business transfers: in connection with a merger, acquisition, or asset sale — with notice to affected users.

All third-party providers are required to maintain appropriate security standards.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.body:
We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. Upon account deletion:

• Your content data is deleted within 30 days.
• Aggregated, anonymised analytics data may be retained indefinitely.
• Data required for legal or compliance purposes is retained for the applicable statutory period.

sections.heading: 7. Security
sections.body:
We implement end-to-end encryption for data in transit and at rest, access controls, regular security audits, and intrusion detection systems. V V AI holds ISO 27001 certification — reflecting our commitment to information security management.

Despite these measures, no system is completely secure. We encourage you to use strong, unique passwords and to notify us immediately of any suspected breach.

sections.heading: 8. Your Rights
sections.body:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

• Access: request a copy of the data we hold about you.
• Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
• Erasure: request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten").
• Restriction: ask us to limit processing of your data.
• Portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
• Objection: object to processing based on legitimate interests.
• Withdrawal of consent: for consent-based processing.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@vvai.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: 9. Cookies & Tracking
sections.body:
We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to operate and improve the Service. Categories include:

• Essential cookies: required for the Service to function.
• Analytics cookies: help us understand how users interact with the Service (Google Analytics 4).
• Preference cookies: remember your settings and preferences.

You may manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may impair functionality.

sections.heading: 10. International Transfers
sections.body: V V AI is headquartered in Singapore. Your data may be processed in Singapore and other countries where our service providers operate. For transfers from the EEA, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission.

sections.heading: 11. Children's Privacy
sections.body:
The Service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

For education products used by students under 18, we comply with applicable student privacy laws and only process data as directed by the educational institution.

sections.heading: 12. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before the changes take effect. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision.

sections.heading: 13. Contact & Data Protection Officer
sections.body:
For privacy inquiries or to exercise your rights:

V V Technology Pte. Ltd.
Singapore
Email: privacy@vvai.com

For GDPR-related inquiries, our Data Protection Officer can also be reached at the email above.

hero.heading: The
hero.body: Four purpose-built suites — Work, Education, Life, and Health — unified by a multimodal AI engine that connects people, businesses, and services.

suites.label: Our Suites
suites.heading: Choose your suite
suites.body: Each suite is independently powerful — together they form a complete intelligent platform.

items.title: Multimodal AI Engine
items.description: Natural language as the interface — speak, type, or act, and V V AI works on your behalf across every suite.

items.title: Unified Ecosystem
items.description: One login connects enterprise, education, lifestyle, and health — no more context-switching between apps.

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: Windows, macOS, Android, iOS, and iPadOS — your data and workflows follow you everywhere.

items.title: End-to-End Encrypted
items.description: ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant. Every communication and document is encrypted at rest and in transit.

cta.heading: Not sure which suite fits your needs?
cta.body: Our team will help you find the right combination for your organisation or personal workflow.

meta.title: News — V V AI
meta.description: Latest product updates, company news, and security announcements from V V AI.

hero.label: News & Updates
hero.heading: What's New at
hero.body: Product launches, company milestones, and security updates — all in one place.

news.cms: Full article pages powered by CMS — coming soon.

posts.title: V V AI Engine 2.0: Multi-Modal Intelligence is Here
posts.excerpt: Our next-generation AI foundation now understands text, voice, and images simultaneously — powering smarter work agents and personal assistants.

posts.title: V V AI Reaches 100+ Education Partners Across APAC
posts.excerpt: From Singapore to the Philippines, our education suite now powers home-school collaboration for over 100 institutions and thousands of families.

posts.title: ISO 27001:2022 Re-Certification Achieved
posts.excerpt: V V AI has successfully re-certified under ISO 27001:2022, reinforcing our commitment to information security management and enterprise trust.

posts.title: Introducing Health Suite: Your AI-Powered Health Manager
posts.excerpt: V V Health brings intelligent health tracking, appointment management, and resource sharing to individuals and healthcare providers alike.

posts.title: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. Closes Series A Round
posts.excerpt: We are pleased to announce the closing of our Series A funding round, accelerating our mission to build AI services across all four life domains.

posts.title: GDPR Compliance Update: What It Means for Our EU Users
posts.excerpt: Full details on our Standard Contractual Clauses, data residency options, and new DPO appointment for European users.

moduleList.label: Modules
moduleList.body: Every module works together seamlessly — no integrations, no silos, no extra cost.

work.label: V V Work
work.headline: One-Stop Smart Collaboration Platform
work.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Intelligence

screenshots.headline: Seamless Enterprise Management: Organize Your Company and Organization From Startup to MNC Effortlessly
screenshots.subtitle: From lean startups to large multinationals, V V Work adapts to any organizational scale — giving you clear hierarchy management, role-based access, and unified visibility across every department and subsidiary.

screenshots.headline: Comprehensive Human Resource Management: Smarter Recruitment, Flexible and Compliant Payroll System
screenshots.subtitle: Streamline your entire HR lifecycle — post jobs, screen candidates with AI, run compliant multi-region payrolls, manage attendance, and conduct performance reviews, all from a single platform.

screenshots.headline: Data-Result Driven Work Management: Seamless Online Collaboration for Better Efficiency
screenshots.subtitle: Set OKRs, break them into trackable milestones, and monitor real-time progress across every team. AI analytics surface bottlenecks early so your organization stays focused and results remain measurable.

screenshots.headline: Unified Communication & Collaboration: Timely, Efficient, and Intelligent for Every Team
screenshots.subtitle: One-click meetings, intelligent group messaging, real-time document co-editing, smart calendar planning, and secure V Drive file access — every tool your team needs to communicate and collaborate, all in one place.

features.title: AI Work Agent
features.description: Super-intelligent AI agent that automates workflows, drafts documents, and surfaces insights on demand.

features.title: OKR & Project Tracking
features.description: Set goals, track milestones, and keep every team aligned with transparent real-time progress boards.

features.title: Encrypted IM & Meetings
features.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging, video conferencing, and smart room booking — all in one place.

features.title: HR Management Suite
features.description: Attendance, payroll, onboarding, performance reviews — the full employee lifecycle in one platform.

features.title: Smart Workflows
features.description: Configurable approval flows and process automation that cut manual work by up to 60%.

features.title: Live Analytics
features.description: Real-time dashboards with AI-generated summaries so leadership always has the full picture.

education.label: V V Education
education.headline: One-stop Educational AI Solutions for All Scenarios
education.subline: The First Agentic AI Operating System for School Ecosystems
education.tagline: Scaling Education with an AI-Driven Performance Engine

screenshots.headline: The Next Generation of School Management: AI-Powered, Human-Connected
screenshots.subtitle: Powering education through AI—streamlining back-office operations and connecting headquarters to parents in one seamless ecosystem.

screenshots.headline: The All-in-One Operating System Driving Growth and Efficiency
screenshots.subtitle: Streamline the entire school enrollment lifecycle—from branding, sign-ups and billing to after-enrollment support—with AI-powered automation.

screenshots.headline: B2C Smart Teaching and Learning
screenshots.subtitle: Empower educators and inspire students with an AI-integrated LMS that automates lesson scheduling, teaching planning, personalizes study paths, and provides 24/7 intelligent tutoring assistants.

screenshots.headline: Home-School Smart IM Communication
screenshots.subtitle: Bridge the gap with an AI-powered IM ecosystem that delivers real-time student updates, automated event reminders, and instant multilingual translation for seamless parent-teacher collaboration.

features.title: Home-School Collaboration
features.description: Bridge the gap between institutions and families with real-time updates, messages, and shared learning plans.

features.title: AI Tutor
features.description: Personalised AI-powered learning assistance that adapts to each student's pace and unique style.

features.title: Class Management
features.description: Scheduling, attendance tracking, homework distribution, and grade management — all automated.

features.title: Learning Reports
features.description: Periodic AI-generated progress reports for parents, students, and educators across multiple institutions.

features.title: Course Sales Platform
features.description: Built-in enrollment, payment, and referral management tools to grow your education business.

features.title: Smart Notifications
features.description: Automated alerts keep parents, students, and teachers informed — without the information overload.

life.label: V V Life
life.headline: Your Personal and Reliable Smart Lifestyle Planner
life.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Convenience

features.title: AI Life Assistant
features.description: A proactive digital companion that anticipates your needs and acts on your words before you ask.

features.title: Dining & Travel
features.description: Smart restaurant discovery, reservation management, trip itineraries, and local service access.

features.title: Life Calendar
features.description: Personal and family scheduling unified in one view — work, social, health, and learning events.

features.title: Connected Services
features.description: One-click access to a curated ecosystem of lifestyle services including finance, transport, and home.

features.title: Private & Secure
features.description: Your personal data stays private. End-to-end encryption keeps every activity and preference protected.

features.title: Invisible Companion
features.description: Runs quietly in the background, surfaces smart suggestions exactly when you need them, never when you don't.

health.label: V V Health
health.headline: Your Reliable, Quick-Response Health Manager
health.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Health

features.title: Health Overview
features.description: A comprehensive health dashboard that aggregates all your metrics, records, and appointments in one view.

features.title: Appointment Booking
features.description: Quick and easy doctor booking with intelligent scheduling that respects your availability.

features.title: Health Records
features.description: Centralised and secure storage for all medical history, test results, prescriptions, and documents.

features.title: AI Risk Detection
features.description: Pattern-based AI alerts that identify health risks early — prevention is better than cure.

features.title: Care Coordination
features.description: Connect seamlessly with healthcare providers, family caregivers, and specialists within the platform.

features.title: Health Resources
features.description: Curated, reliable health education content that empowers you to make informed wellness decisions.
